zh.Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭爾希布盧可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Warin de Vernon於大約1135年出生在英國爾諾維其時，他的父親Hugh de Vernon24歲，母親Margaret de Knightley22歲。他於1154年與Maud de Balliol在英國英格蘭爾希布盧可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1190年之後，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾保斯托。

zh-hans.Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰爾希布盧可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Warin de Vernon于大约1135年出生在英国爾諾維其时，他的父亲Hugh de Vernon24岁，母亲Margaret de Knightley22岁。他于1154年与Maud de Balliol在英国英格兰爾希布盧可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1190年之后，埋葬在英国英格兰爾保斯托。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

en.lifeSummary: When Warin de Vernon was born about 1135, in Northwich, Cheshire, England, his father, Hugh de Vernon, was 24 and his mother, Margaret de Knightley, was 22. He married Maud de Balliol in 1154, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1190, and was buried in Bostock, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Warin de Vernon est né environ 1135, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Vernon, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Knightley, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Balliol en 1154, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1190, et a été enterré à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Warin de Vernon um 1135 in Northwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Vernon 24 und seine Mutter Margaret de Knightley 22. Er hat 1154 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Maud de Balliol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1190 und wurde in Bostock, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Warin de Vernon è nato il circa 1135 nel Northwich, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Vernon, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Knightley, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Balliol nel 1154, nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1190, e fu sepolto a Bostock, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Warin de Vernonが約1135年にイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチで生まれた時，父Hugh de Vernonは24歳，母Margaret de Knightleyは22歳であった。1154年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークでMaud de Balliolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1190年以後に死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアボストックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Warin de Vernon(이)가 대략 1135년 영국 체실르 노르스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Vernon(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Knightley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1154년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 시브룩에서 Maud de Balliol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 이후 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 보스톡에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Warin de Vernon nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Vernon, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Knightley, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Balliol em 1154, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1190, e foi sepultado em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Warin de Vernon родился около 1135 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Vernon было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Knightley, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Balliol в 1154 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1190 г. и был похоронен в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1135–after 1190: e tusa o le 1135–ina ua ma'ea le 1190

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Warin de Vernon nació aproximadamente 1135, en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Vernon, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret de Knightley, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Maud de Balliol en 1154, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1190, y fue sepultado en Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
